notes: Serial number: set a station serial number on the Opta (Data Log tab, Set on device), persisted in flash, reported in status, and auto-fills the run name. Bundled Opta firmware refreshed with audit fixes: display Fan/Actuator buttons work while in FAULT, manual fan setting sticks, abort re-arms the drive, queued display presses are not dropped. After updating the app, use Update Firmware to flash the Opta to get the firmware behavior + serial number.
